response.overview: Warada Kageda? is a 1954 Sri Lankan film directed by T. R. Sundaram and D. V. Chari. The film stars Prem Jayanth, Rita Ratnayake, Laddie Ranasinghe, Shanthi Lekha, Dommie Jayawardena, Udula Dabare, Christy Leonard Perera. Released on 9 April.Karunaratne Abeysekeramade his film debut as a lyricist. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Warada Kageda?
